mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (title, description, completed, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{completed}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = true
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN completed = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
